evals.prompt: Should we bid on this contract? Grill me on our reasoning.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, loads workspace KG (competitor, incumbent, win_theme, hot_button, budget, customer), starts with question 1 (opportunity fit) with any KG-specific substitutions, provides recommended answer, waits for response before asking question 2.

evals.prompt: We're thinking about bidding the recompete. Push back hard on our assumptions.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, loads KG, works through all 10 bid-strategy questions one at a time, challenges vague answers with follow-ups, surfaces incumbent vulnerabilities from KG data.

evals.prompt: I need to prep for a bid gate review tomorrow. Stress-test everything.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates with urgency signal, loads KG, focuses on PWin assumptions and discriminator validity, pushes for crisp bid/no-bid recommendation at question 10.
